title: Goedkeuringssysteem
desc: Controleer bestellingen van de vloot voordat ze worden verwerkt

treatments.brief: An approval-queue table titled 'Goedkeuringen' with a 'Te keuren · 2' pill top-right of the inner panel; columns Schip / Bedrag / Status; rows: MS Aldebaran €2.480 (Te keuren, blue pill), MS Castor €1.150 (Te keuren), MS Pollux €860 (Goedgekeurd, green pill), MS Vesta €3.240 (Goedgekeurd); anchor icon per ship; a check/checkbox affordance on a Te-keuren row. Footer: green dot + '2 te keuren · maart 2026'.

A vertical approval status-timeline for one order. Subtitle line: 'Bestelling PO-2026-0482 · MS Aldebaran · €2.480'. Nodes top-to-bottom: 'Aanvraag ingediend' (green check, done) → 'Ter goedkeuring' (navy LIVE node with a small 'nu' pill, the single signature) → 'Goedgekeurd' (grey pending) → 'Verwerkt' (grey pending). Green spine for done, dashed grey after the live node.

A single pending-order approval card. Inner panel header: 'MS Castor · Tuigerij' + a 'Te keuren' blue pill; a compact 2-3 line item list with a total €1.150; two actions at the bottom — a primary navy 'Keur goed' button (white text) + a quiet 'Wijs af' ghost/outline button. The approve action is the signature.

An approval-routing / threshold decision diagram: an incoming order amount flows into a navy decision node (the signature) that branches by a drempelbedrag rule — '< €1.000 → automatisch verwerkt' (green path) vs '≥ €1.000 → ter goedkeuring bij beheerder K. Visser' (navy path). Two outcome tiles at the ends. Dashed connectors, chevrons.

An approval overview: a donut/ring (navy carries it) showing this month's split — Goedgekeurd (green segment), Te keuren (blue), Afgewezen (red, small) — with a center total '18 bestellingen'; plus two stat tiles beside/below it: '14 goedgekeurd' and 'gem. doorlooptijd 3 u'. maart 2026.
